intro: The Hesperaster, also known as Hesperozygis sandwicensis, is a perennial plant native to Hawaii, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The health benefits of Hesperaster include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage.
